title: Assertion failure during synth_ice40/fsm_extract
body:
I encountered an assertion failure while running `synth_ice40` as part of the OpenTitan Yosys synthesis flow. I've been able to reproduce it in the much smaller Ibex synthesis flow. I'm not sure if I can easily make the reproduction steps much smaller.

## Steps to reproduce the issue

Note the the ibex flow depends on sv2v. The source files can be generated using:
```
git clone https://github.com/zachjs/ibex.git
cd ibex
make -C formal
```

Then, using Yosys built from the latest master:
```
yosys -p "read_verilog syn/rtl/prim_clock_gating.v formal/build/*.v" -p "synth_ice40"
```

## Expected behavior

Synthesis should succeed.

## Actual behavior

An assertion failure occurs:
```
Extracting FSM `\load_store_unit_i.data_type_q' from module `\ibex_core'.
  found $adff cell for state register: $techmap\load_store_unit_i.$procdff$10759
  root of input selection tree: $techmap\load_store_unit_i.$0\data_type_q[1:0]
  found reset state: 2'00 (from async reset)
  found ctrl input: \load_store_unit_i.ctrl_update
  found ctrl input: $auto$opt_reduce.cc:134:opt_mux$10944
  found ctrl input: $techmap\id_stage_i.decoder_i.$procmux$4583_CMP
  found ctrl input: $techmap\id_stage_i.decoder_i.$procmux$5010_CMP
  found state code: 2'01
  found state code: 2'10
  found ctrl output: $techmap\load_store_unit_i.$procmux$7739_CMP
  found ctrl output: $techmap\load_store_unit_i.$procmux$7738_CMP
  found ctrl output: $techmap\load_store_unit_i.$procmux$7737_CMP [1]
  found ctrl output: $techmap\load_store_unit_i.$procmux$7737_CMP [0]
  ctrl inputs: { $auto$opt_reduce.cc:134:opt_mux$10944 $techmap\id_stage_i.decoder_i.$procmux$4583_CMP $techmap\id_stage_i.decoder_i.$procmux$5010_CMP \load_store_unit_i.ctrl_update }
  ctrl outputs: { $techmap\load_store_unit_i.$0\data_type_q[1:0] $techmap\load_store_unit_i.$procmux$7738_CMP $techmap\load_store_unit_i.$procmux$7737_CMP $techmap\load_store_unit_i.$procmux$7739_CMP }
  transition:       2'00 4'---0 ->       2'00 6'000001
  transition:       2'00 4'0--1 ->       2'00 6'000001
  transition:       2'00 4'1001 ->       2'00 6'000001
  transition:       2'00 4'1-11 ->       2'10 6'100001
  transition:       2'00 4'11-1 ->       2'01 6'010001
  transition:       2'10 4'---0 ->       2'10 6'100010
  transition:       2'10 4'0--1 ->       2'00 6'000010
  transition:       2'10 4'1001 ->       2'00 6'000010
  transition:       2'10 4'1-11 ->       2'10 6'100010
  transition:       2'10 4'11-1 ->       2'01 6'010010
  transition:       2'01 4'---0 ->       2'01 6'011000
  transition:       2'01 4'0--1 ->       2'00 6'001000
  transition:       2'01 4'1001 ->       2'00 6'001000
  transition:       2'01 4'1-11 ->       2'10 6'101000
  transition:       2'01 4'11-1 ->       2'01 6'011000
ERROR: Assert `(unsigned)*c > (unsigned)' '' failed in ./kernel/rtlil.h:168.
```

This assertion was introduced in https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/pull/2092. Interestingly, with that assertion commented out, the command runs to completion and the resulting BLIF file appears to be valid.

I can catch the issue in `gdb` and the assertion is raised during `fsm_extract`. It fails trying to construct an `RTLIL::IdString` like `$fsm_unconnect$$techmap\\load_store_unit_i.$procmux$76659_CMP [0]$82192`.

Please let me know if there is anything further I can do to help debug this issue!
